title: Cyberpunk Edgerunners
description: This is a Cyberpunk: Edgerunner Anime Themed Pack adds audio, gui, fonts and a new menu background
body:
Introduction: This GUI-only resource pack is themed around the show "Cyberpunk: Edgerunners" You can use it with other resource packs by placing it on top.

## Hightlight

![Menu Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1oTRf3B3/images/0b870df24d1c950073bec4347848e1883e3bc84a.png)

**Additional Resources:**
- Check out more content on [My Website](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/)
- Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/83SJPnncCA) server to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and join anime discussions.
Thank you for your support! ❤️

## Screenshots

![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1oTRf3B3/images/548b629f143d85384679fca1bfd30e119619831c.png)

## **V2.0 UPDATE**

- **FULL Survival support For the containers**
- **Added HUD features**


![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1oTRf3B3/images/d0baeb375e1d41110b1af51f497d79c007146dbe.png)

![Shulker Box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1oTRf3B3/images/233d84f8139eb2c8a119b6ca0225bee4ca17814c.png)
